rationale: Educ. Code §18.006 governs accountability ratings for Job Corps diploma programs. It has no fiscal, operational, or substantive connection to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: The commissioner shall develop and implement a system of accountability consistent with Chapters 39 and 39A, where appropriate, to be used in assigning an annual performance rating to Job Corps diploma programs comparable to the ratings assigned to school districts under Section 39.054.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns Job Corps program accountability and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
